title: Fly Zapper Electric Indoor,Powerful 3500V &20W UV Killer Electric, Bug Zapper Indoor Insect Trap,Washable Tray and Hanging Chain Suitable for Bedroom,Living room,Dining Room (3500V Fly Zapper)
bullet_points: Powerful fly catcher with 3500V high-voltage grid&20W UV (10w+10w) equal to 20w –chemical-free, kills fruit flies & mosquitoes fast, no need to use any chemical ingredients,safe and environmental protection, to protect the health of the family

Advanced electric fly killer using dual 365–395nm light for superior insect attraction indoor & outdoor, maximum simulation of flying insects favourite light bands, effectively attract and kill a variety of flying insects

Removable easy-clean fly zapper indoor –hygienic for effortless maintenance,the internal trap box can be easily disassembled and cleaned, cleaning is also newbie friendly, keeping the equipment running efficiently for a long time.

Child-safe mesh guard and whisper-quiet operation for silent, safe electric fly killers usage,multiple safety nets are specially installed to prevent children and pets from accidentally touching the grid, doubling the safety.

Effective fly killers for the home pest management combining convenience and safety for home use,whether in the kitchen, living room, balcony, terrace or office, it can play a stable role in fly and mosquito control.
